message:
feat(br-b9k2): wire am ci CLI subcommand

- Add `am ci` command with --quick, --report, --json flags
- --quick: skip long-running E2E gates
- --report <path>: write JSON report to file
- --json: output JSON to stdout instead of human-readable
- Integrate with gate runner engine and JSON report generator
- Progress output during gate execution
- Exit code 0 on success, 1 on failure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
